projectDescription: A multi-modal world model framework that reconstructs, generates, and simulates navigable 3D worlds (meshes and 3D Gaussian Splatting) from text, images, and video inputs.
keyFeatures: World Reconstruction: multi-view images or video to 3D (point clouds, depth, normals, camera poses, 3DGS) in a single forward pass via WorldMirror 2.0
World Generation: text or single image to navigable 3D world via 4-stage pipeline (HY-Pano 2.0 → WorldNav → WorldStereo 2.0 → WorldMirror 2.0)
Prior injection for camera extrinsics, intrinsics, and depth maps to improve reconstruction accuracy
Multi-GPU inference with Sequence Parallel (SP), FSDP, and bfloat16 support
Interactive Gradio web demo for real-time 3DGS visualization
Engine-compatible outputs (3DGS, meshes, PLY, COLMAP) importable into Blender/Unity/Unreal Engine/Isaac Sim
Flexible-resolution inference (50K–500K pixels) with normalized RoPE
publicApiSurface: WorldMirrorPipeline.from_pretrained(pretrained_model_name_or_path, subfolder, config_path, ckpt_path, use_fsdp, enable_bf16, fsdp_cpu_offload, disable_heads)

WorldMirrorPipeline.__call__(input_path, output_path, target_size, fps, video_strategy, save_depth, save_normal, save_gs, save_camera, save_points, save_colmap, prior_cam_path, prior_depth_path, compress_pts, save_rendered)
